overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing the player character exploring Kresilas's Residence and the Temple of Artemis Skyrna in ancient Kydonia at night. The character moves through torchlit corridors and outdoor terraces, examining a large robed statue before approaching a coastal temple with a group of NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone corridor of ancient residence

agents.ego_description: walking through torchlit interior corridor holding a flame torch

entered.detail: irregular hexagonal stone paving on the ground
thick wooden support columns with red painted bases
large terracotta storage vessel against the wall
dark wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a narrow torchlit corridor inside Kresilas's Residence, with stone floors and wooden pillars. The space is enclosed with no sky visible, creating an intimate artificial lighting environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor terrace with monumental statue under wooden pergola

events.description: exits covered corridor onto open terrace revealing large robed statue

agents.ego_description: approaching a large statue under a wooden pergola while holding torch

entered.detail: tall weathered bronze or stone statue of robed figure holding a dish
wooden lattice canopy structure over the statue
low stone walls marking terrace boundaries

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the residence onto a stone terrace under a night sky, approaching a monumental robed statue sheltered by a wooden pergola. The lighting shifts from torch-only to mixed moonlight and torchlight.

events.description: stops walking to examine statue up close, looking upward at the figure
turns away from statue and resumes walking toward residential buildings

agents.ego_description: circling the statue and examining its details from various angles before departing

segments.scene_description: The player character circles the massive robed statue, examining its weathered surface and the wooden pergola frame overhead. After a close inspection looking up at the figure against the night sky, the character turns and walks away toward a nearby residence.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential path leading to temple

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path past a two-story residence toward a coastal temple

notable_agents.action: standing near the residence holding a lit torch

entered.detail: ancient Greek house with lit windows and wooden balcony
classical temple structure with columns visible in distance
four figures standing on cliff edge overlooking the sea
dark sea visible beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through a residential area with grass and trees, passing a two-story house with lit windows. In the distance, a group of NPCs stands on a cliff edge overlooking the sea near the Temple of Artemis Skyrna.

events.description: enters the Temple of Artemis Skyrna through large bronze doors

agents.ego_description: approaching the temple entrance and entering the inner sanctuary to view the statue

entered.detail: classical Greek temple with stone columns and decorated pediment
fluted marble columns supporting the temple portico
white marble statue of Artemis with a deer inside the cella
frescoes depicting mythological scenes on interior walls
ornate carved stone above the bronze temple doors

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing Temple of Artemis Skyrna, ascends the stone steps, and enters through large bronze doors. Inside the sanctuary, the lighting shifts to dim interior illumination revealing a marble statue of Artemis with a deer, flanked by mural paintings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the intimate, torchlit interiors of a private residence to the grand, moonlit sanctuary of a coastal temple. It begins within a narrow corridor of stone and wood, moving forward until the enclosed space opens onto a stone terrace under a dark night sky. As the camera circles a monumental robed statue sheltered by a wooden pergola, the lighting shifts from artificial torchlight to a mix of moonlight before the character turns away to traverse a dirt path through a residential area. The scene then expands across grassy terrain and past lit houses toward a distant cliffside where a group of NPCs gathers. Finally, the camera ascends the stone steps of the imposing Temple of Artemis Skyrna and passes through bronze doors into a dim sanctuary featuring a marble statue and mural paintings.
